name: Closed Hip Twist
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Hand To Hand RSP, Natural Top, New York LSP, Opening Out To Right And Left, Progressive Walks Forward in RSP, Progressive Walks Forward in Right Shadow Position, Rope Spinning, Shoulder To Shoulder Left Side, Three Alemanas
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Sliding Doors, Fencing, Three Alemanas, Basic Movements: Open, Open Hip Twist, Curl, Three Threes, New York LSP, Spot or Switch Turn To R, Underarm Turn To L, Reverse Top
notes:
Alternative Finishing Positions:
Open Position: Man turn 1/4 L over 5 & 6
Open CPP:
Man turn 1/8 L over 5 & 6, leading lady to overturn on 5, both taking 6 diag. fwd.
Lady turns an additional 1/8 L on 5 using loosely crossed spiral action.
Contact Position:
Man turn 1/2 L over 5 & 6 to end RF side and slightly fwd.
Lady 3/4 L over 5 & 6 to end LF behind RF as Cuban Cross.
Normal hold retained throughout.

steps.action: Step to side in RSP with slight body turn to R
Close LF to RF with very slight body turn to L
Step to side in Fan Position
Step back in RSP, 1/2 turn to R
comments: Turn starts end of previous beat.

Turn shoulder first, then turn twist hip sharp for fast 1/2 turn to R, now RF is in front. RF is turned out, lift the heel up. Do not leave RF trailing during turn. RF and R leg should have nice long leg line. then place RF back.
"Give" Man right arm, keep tone in arm, energy forward.
"3 &", on "&" start turning 1/2 to L to face Man.
Keep foot pressure on floor, track RF while turning. Turning shoulder/body first.

steps.action: RF fwd in line with LF towards Man's R side, 1/2 to L
comments: Option 1: "4 1 &", do not turn to R early, Hold on 1, straighten R leg with weight, then turn to R on "&".
Option 2: straighten and turn at the same time on "1" for more energy.

steps.action: LF fwd passing in front of Man, 1/4 to R
comments: Turn starts end of previous beat.
after turning, don't pause LF, place it and transfer weight
Turn is initiated from hips. Hips turn more than body.

steps.action: RF fwd in line with LF, then turn to end RF back, 1/2 to L, body turn less
comments: RF step fwd, really wrap R arm around belly tight, do not turn body too early.
Then sharp 1/2 turn. Forward Walk Turn.
Do not let body weight take over.
After turning, there is still weight on LF (LF in front after turning), body weight fwd, keep tone/tension in RH with Man, before stepping LF back on "4".

steps.action: LF back in Fan Position, body completes turn
comments: Release L leg and step back ahead of body. Backward walk action.
Fan position is a picture pose position. Give it some "significance" with more arm styling.
Body turns to left in the direction of the hand, do not tilt shoulders.
Look at your audience, along the L arm.
